prompt: We have an upcoming audit. I need a full report showing how URS-105 maps down to the functional specs and test cases to prove we didn't miss anything.

expected.generateTraceabilityMatrix: generate a Requirement Traceability Matrix (RTM) report specifically for URS-105 to show lineage to functional specs and test cases.
expected.generateTestCases: generate validation or verification test protocols for URS-105 to prove that nothing was missed during the audit.
